questions.question_text: CO Mapping What is morality? What is the concept of Conciliation? Name any four Competent Authorities that have Administrative powers for approval and control of land in Indian. List any 4 attributes of a good moral conduct and ethics of a professional. Which according to you is the most important and why? Why is the ‘Doctrine of Estoppel’ important? What is Scrape Value? What Services can a qualified architect offer professionally? Name 5 professional consultants you would collaborate with to deliver a healthcare project? CO Mapping
What are the roles and responsibilities of Council of Architecture?
Name any 5 Acts in architecture profession governing the professional practice in India and their major areas of binding. CO Mapping
What are the general obligations of an Architect to the Public in terms of morals and ethics?
Define Ethics and the Levels of regulating professional practice. What are the three Tiers of professional ethics? CO Mapping
What ‘excepted matters’ come under the purview of Project architect functioning as a ‘Quasi-Arbitrator’?
What do you understand depreciation in terms of property valuation. Compare to Obsolence. CO Mapping
How would you set up your own practice after graduating with a degree in Architecture? Write an essay explaining various steps & procedures.
Outline the process of Tendering for selection of contractor in a commercial project.
